close_reason: README example shows direct usage; umbrella usage is in secretx crate docs
description:
README.md:19-31 — the example only shows direct construction of DopplerBackend. The README's own footer ('Enable the doppler feature on the secretx umbrella crate to use it via URI dispatch') hints that URI dispatch is the recommended path, but no example shows it.

Fix: add a second 'Recommended via the umbrella crate' code block showing secretx::from_uri('secretx:doppler:...') . The current example as-is is fine for someone who specifically wants to depend only on this backend, but the umbrella path should be primary.
title: README example shows direct DopplerBackend; never shows umbrella secretx::from_uri dispatch
